/usr/bin/ar qc libtack_strat_core.a CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/java_random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/hex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/game_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/wild_animal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/city.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/city_name_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/combat_rng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/regional_weather.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/map_size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/world_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/game_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/game_session_rules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/game_session_snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/seat_ai.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/snapshot_validate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/snapshot_digest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/text_play.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tack_strat_core.dir/src/engine/net/turn_sync.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtack_strat_core.a
